# Server-side runtime dependencies.
# Install from the project root:
#   /root/anaconda3/envs/yjstudio-server/bin/python -m pip install -r config/env/requirements-server.txt

--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124

fastapi
uvicorn
httptools
websockets
watchfiles
python-dotenv
python-multipart
aiofiles
orjson
httpx
requests
cachetools

numpy
scipy
matplotlib
pillow
PyYAML
pydantic
pyzmq
psutil
zarr
numcodecs
segyio

torch==2.6.0+cu124
torchvision==0.21.0+cu124
# Linux server cross-frame SAM3 tracking uses Triton kernels. Torch 2.6
# expects Triton 3.2.x; keep Windows-specific triton-windows out of server envs.
triton==3.2.0; platform_system == "Linux"
timm
transformers
safetensors
tokenizers
huggingface_hub
einops
ftfy
iopath
opencv-python-headless
pycocotools
regex
tqdm
rich
colorlog

pytest
